title: Peppery Gooey Fish Stir-fry
description: A quick and flavorful weeknight dish featuring fish stock, pickled vegetables, and a tangy peppery sauce for added depth of flavor.

ingredients.name: Spices (salt, pepper, crushed red pepper flakes)

instructions: Heat a skillet over medium-high heat. Add fish stock and bring to a simmer.
Add pickled vegetables, diced bell peppers, and finely chopped onion into the skillet with the fish stock. Stir occasionally for about 5 minutes until veggies are tender.
If using fish fillets or shreds, season them with salt, pepper, and crushed red pepper flakes (to taste). Add to the skillet and cook for another 2-3 minutes until fully cooked through.
Add soy sauce, garlic powder, and coconut milk. Stir well to combine all ingredients thoroughly.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for an additional 2 minutes to let flavors meld together. Taste and adjust seasoning if needed.
Serve hot as a main course or side dish with rice or naan bread.
